resources.string: Choose how often LogDate puts together your weekly Rewind and whether you want to be told when one is ready.
Each week, LogDate quietly stitches your entries into a story so it's waiting for you when you open the app. Turn this off and rewinds only get made when you ask for them.
Notify me when a Rewind is ready
Get a tap-to-watch notification the moment your latest weekly Rewind finishes. This is on top of Android's notification controls; turning it off here stops the app from posting one at all.
You've reviewed all your weekly rewinds
Go live a little, will ya?
Still working on the Rewind. Go touch some grass in the meantime.
